pr.title: fix: remove dead code in AnalyzeHotwords
pr.body:
## Summary

Removes dead code in `AnalyzeHotwords` flagged by Devin Review on PR #11:
- Removed `json.Marshal(t)` call whose result was immediately discarded (`_ = tags`)
- Removed unused `encoding/json` import that only existed for the dead code

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Verify `go vet ./...` passes (confirmed locally)

### Notes
Addresses Devin Review finding from PR #11. Zero behavioral change — the removed code had no effect.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99
Requested by: @divord97
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
